implBasis: 自建 Field-family (Family 4) control; native <input type=text inputMode=decimal> + internal draft-string state; consumes fieldWrapperStyles + bareInputStyles + ItemInlineAction + formatNumber (toLocaleString); no lib wrap

falseClaims.宣稱: 科學記號輸入(1e5):Number(raw) parse 為 100000,非 NaN 即觸發 onChange(number-input.tsx:136-138)

readonly compound className 實際在 field-wrapper.tsx:144(bg-readonly border border-transparent + focus-visible ring);行 109 是 edit compound 內的 Material Design 3 註解。行為描述正確但 line-ref stale
